leap.example: The frog leaped over the rock.
The frog took a big leap.

learning.example: Reading is an important part of learning.
learning.example_zh: 閱讀是學習的重要部分。

leather.example: He bought a brown leather wallet.

leisure.example: She reads books in her leisure time.

lemonade.example: We drank cold lemonade in the heat.
lemonade.example_zh: 大熱天我們喝冰檸檬水。

leopard.example: A leopard can run very fast.

lettuce.example: Add some lettuce to the sandwich.

lick.example: She gave the ice cream a lick.

lighthouse.example: The lighthouse guided the ships at night.

lightning.example: Lightning lit up the dark sky.
lightning.example_zh: 閃電照亮了漆黑的天空。

lily.example: A white lily grew by the pond.
lily.example_zh: 池塘邊長著一朵白百合。

limb.example_zh: 伸展能讓四肢保持靈活。

litter.example: Please don't litter in the park.
The beach was covered with litter.

lively.example: The party was lively and fun.

loaf.example: She baked a loaf of bread.

lobby.example: We waited in the hotel lobby.

locate.example: The shop is located near the station.

location.example: This is a good location for a store.

lock.example: Please lock the door when you leave.
The lock on the gate is broken.

log.example: He threw a log onto the fire.
log.example_zh: 他往火裡丟了一根木頭。

log.example: Please log in with your password.

lollipop.example: The child enjoyed a sweet lollipop.
lollipop.example_zh: 那孩子吃著一支甜甜的棒棒糖。

loose.example: The button on my shirt is loose.

lord.example: The land belonged to a powerful lord.
lord.example_zh: 這塊地屬於一位有權勢的領主。

loser.example: He is a good loser and never complains.

lover.example: She is a great lover of music.
The two lovers walked in the park.
lover.example_zh: 那對戀人在公園裡散步。

luggage.example: We carried our luggage onto the train.

magician.example: The magician pulled a rabbit from his hat.
magician.example_zh: 魔術師從帽子裡變出一隻兔子。

maid.example: The maid cleaned the guest rooms.

mall.example: We spent the afternoon at the mall.
mall.example_zh: 我們在購物中心待了一下午。

mankind-humankind.example: Clean water is important for all mankind.
mankind-humankind.example_zh: 乾淨的水對全人類都很重要。

marble.example: The floor is made of white marble.
marble.example_zh: 地板是用白色大理石鋪的。

marble.example: The children played with glass marbles.

march.example: The soldiers marched down the street.

march.example_zh: 他們舉行了一場和平遊行。

marker.example: She wrote the title with a red marker.
marker.example_zh: 她用紅色麥克筆寫標題。

marker.example: A stone marker shows the border.

marvelous.example: We had a marvelous time at the beach.
marvelous.example_zh: 我們在海灘玩得非常開心。

mathematical.example: He solved a difficult mathematical problem.
mathematical.example_zh: 他解開了一道困難的數學題。

mayor.example: The mayor opened the new library.

meadow.example: Cows grazed in the green meadow.
meadow.example_zh: 牛群在綠色的草地上吃草。

meaningful.example_zh: 她給了一個有意義的回答。

meanwhile.example: I cooked dinner; meanwhile, he set the table.
meanwhile.example_zh: 我煮晚餐，同時他擺好餐桌。

medal.example: She won a gold medal in swimming.
medal.example_zh: 她在游泳項目贏得一面金牌。

medium-media.example: The news spread through social media.
medium-media.example_zh: 這消息透過社群媒體傳開。
顏料是她最愛的創作媒材。

melon.example: This melon is sweet and cool.

melt.example: The ice melted in the warm sun.
melt.example_zh: 冰在溫暖的陽光下融化了。

mental.example: Exercise is good for your mental health.

merry.example: We wish you a merry Christmas.

microwave.example: Heat the soup in the microwave.

microwave.example_zh: 她把剩菜用微波爐加熱。

mighty.example: The mighty river flowed to the sea.
mighty.example_zh: 那條洶湧的大河流向大海。

minus.example: The temperature dropped to minus five.

miracle.example: It was a miracle that he survived.

misery.example: The war brought misery to many.
misery.example_zh: 戰爭為許多人帶來苦難。

missile.example: The missile flew across the sky.
